title: Update\n 2.0.3
body: What's New?: ✅Added Smoothing system for camera Three configurable sliders in the menu: ꕥ Position: Positional movement smoothing ∴Rotation: Rotation/orientation smoothing >Snap to Object: Auto-adjustment to selected object ⚠️Note: The Snap slider doesn't work very well for now. It's recommended to keep it at 0. I'll keep investigating and improving its functionality in future versions. counterclockwise
